creator: hselasky@FreeBSD.org
text:
> Unfortunately I couldn't test it with VLC, as soon as virtual_oss was running > VLC didn't show pcm devices anymore. Thus I ran JACK on the
> "/dev/dsp.surround", mpv on "/dev/dsp.stereo". But the virtual_oss_ctl GUI definitely helps to see what's going on.

VLC is a bit strange. You need to manually select OSS, and then enter /dev/dsp.xxx in the preferences . Then you need save that, and restart VLC. Then it will use that audio device!

I'm open to making virtual_oss more user-friendly, and your feedback and first-time experiences are valuable.

--HPS
